cases.description: Explicit contribution request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: I want to contribute my custom rule back to Codi
expectations: Proposes `codi contribute` as the default path
Targets the `develop` branch (not main) for the PR

cases.description: Private ZIP sharing request triggers the skill
cases.prompt: export my skill as a ZIP so I can share it with my team
expectations: Runs `codi contribute` and selects the ZIP export path
Explains recipient installs via `codi preset install <path>`
Does NOT attempt to open a PR

cases.description: Contribution to a custom team repo triggers the skill
expectations: Does NOT hardcode the official Codi repository

cases.description: Ordinary code commit request does NOT trigger the skill
cases.prompt: commit my latest changes to src/utils.ts
expectations: Routes to the commit skill or a regular git flow instead

cases.description: Installing a preset (not contributing) does NOT trigger the skill
expectations: Does NOT attempt to open a PR or export a ZIP
